title: Fix default AppArmor profile to contain version suffix
body:
The default AppArmor profile is now `container-default-$VERSION`, which
was previously only `container-default`.

Requires https://github.com/containers/common/pull/185
Fixes https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/6724

I think we need to fix that in c/common as c/common/pkg/apparmor is broken. See https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/6724#issuecomment-648105172.

> I think we need to fix that in c/common as c/common/pkg/apparmor is broken. See [#6724 (comment)](https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/6724#issuecomment-648105172).

Yes, see https://github.com/containers/common/pull/185 (I'll vendor that PR here)
Okay, closing in favor of an containers/common-only solution.
